narratives.Overview: Set up the marky monorepo structure with three packages (core, plugin-mermaid, compat-markdownlint), shared TypeScript and vitest config, a root Taskfile.yml with standard deft task targets, and a root package.json with workspace configuration.

items.title: Root package.json with npm/pnpm workspaces pointing to packages/*
packages/core, packages/plugin-mermaid, packages/compat-markdownlint directories each with package.json, tsconfig.json, and src/index.ts stub
Root tsconfig.json with strict mode, ESM output, Node 18 target; each package extends root
Root vitest.config.ts with workspace mode; coverage threshold set to 85% (v8 provider)
Root Taskfile.yml with tasks: build, test, test:coverage, lint, fmt, check (runs all), clean
task check passes (no source yet, but toolchain resolves without errors)
